title: post api agent valid EVM token returns structured verdict
description: Test POST /api/agent with a valid EVM coin_symbol (DOGE), a well-formed EVM contract_address, and chain_id=1. Verify response status 202 Accepted with a job_id and poll_url. Poll GET /api/agent/[job_id] every 5 seconds until status is completed. Verify final completed JSON body includes all required fields: request_id (string), coin_symbol (matches request), drama_index (number 0-100), dominant_branch (non-empty string), branch_probabilities (object), evidence_chain (array), executable_verdict (one of LIQUIDATE_LONGS|HOLD|ACCUMULATE|IGNORE_FUD), served_from_cache (boolean false). Confirm fallback is absent or false.

title: post api agent missing coin_symbol returns 400
description: Test POST /api/agent with an empty payload {}. Verify response status is 400 and the JSON body contains an 'error' field describing the missing coin_symbol parameter.

title: post api agent native token without contract address returns 200
description: Test POST /api/agent with coin_symbol=BTC and no contract_address field. Verify response status is 202 Accepted with a job_id and poll_url. Poll GET /api/agent/[job_id] every 5 seconds until status is completed. Since BTC is a native token, DEX and security data should be skipped. Verify the completed response JSON still includes all required schema fields: request_id, coin_symbol, drama_index, dominant_branch, branch_probabilities, evidence_chain, executable_verdict, served_from_cache.

title: post api agent Solana token with native contract address returns 200
description: Test POST /api/agent with coin_symbol=SOL and contract_address=native. Verify response status is 202 Accepted with a job_id and poll_url. Poll GET /api/agent/[job_id] every 5 seconds until status is completed. Verify the pipeline gracefully handles the native token path and all required fields are present in the final completed response JSON.

title: post api agent unknown fake coin returns 200 with fallback indicators
description: Test POST /api/agent with coin_symbol=FAKECOIN999 and a random fake contract_address. Verify response status is 202 Accepted with a job_id and poll_url. Poll GET /api/agent/[job_id] every 5 seconds until status is completed. Verify final status is completed with fallback=true or still returns a valid MCTS verdict. All schema fields must be present.

title: post api agent ambiguous token returns honest verdict without infinite loop
description: Test POST /api/agent with coin_symbol=AI and no contract_address field. Verify response status is 202 Accepted with a job_id and poll_url. Poll GET /api/agent/[job_id] every 5 seconds until status is completed or failed. Assert the job completes within 90 seconds (no infinite loop due to CRITICAL-04 fix). Assert that if the data is insufficient due to ambiguity, the final completed JSON body includes an executable_verdict of INSUFFICIENT_DATA or IGNORE_FUD with low confidence, ensuring the engine does not fabricate an outcome.

title: post api agent simulated sybil and injection returns security signals
description: Test POST /api/agent with coin_symbol=TESTFUD1. Verify response status is 202 Accepted with a job_id and poll_url. Poll GET /api/agent/[job_id] every 5 seconds until status is completed. This token is configured to fetch mock RapidAPI data containing duplicate prompt-injection payloads. Verify the completed response JSON contains an evidence_chain that includes '[SECURITY]' (injection detection) and '[SYBIL]' (coordination detection). Also verify coordination_signals object shows a unique_author_ratio < 0.5 and duplicate_text_cluster_size > 2.
